usersJsonPath.label: Users JSON Path
usersJsonPath.help: Path to users.json relative to workspace. Default: ask_me_first/users.json

stateRefreshIntervalMs.label: State Refresh Interval (ms)
stateRefreshIntervalMs.help: How often to refresh avatar state. Default: 600000 (10 min)

cacheTTL.label: Cache TTL (ms)
cacheTTL.help: In-memory cache lifetime for users.json. Default: 5000

enablePresence.label: Enable Presence Detection
enablePresence.help: Detect foreground window for state. Windows only.

enableCalendar.label: Enable Calendar Integration
enableCalendar.help: Use calendar events for state detection.

calendarLookaheadHours.label: Calendar Lookahead (hours)
calendarLookaheadHours.help: How far ahead to check calendar. Default: 1
